gaps.description: The fragments successfully detail the journey and heritage of materials like leather and cashmere, tying them to traditional workshops. However, a dedicated origin story detailing the specific fields or regions of fiber sourcing is not explicitly present.
gaps.suggestedAction: Write a 200-word fr-fr product-story fragment covering "fibers provenance", applying premium-tone.

gaps.description: No fragments explicitly mention external partner houses, collaborating entities, or detailed accreditation/certification schemes beyond general brand philosophy.
gaps.suggestedAction: Write a 200-word fr-fr product-story fragment covering "partner houses and certifications", applying premium-tone.

gaps.description: Comprehensive care guides are available for specific high-value items (like cashmere and leather goods), offering deep maintenance advice. However, a single definitive resource covering the care of every product line remains undefined.
gaps.suggestedAction: Write a 200-word fr-fr care-guide fragment covering "care instructions", applying premium-tone.

gaps.description: The available content strongly conveys the artisanal nature and slow, tradition-based creation process implied by 'small batch.' However, explicit usage of terms related to production volume or limited runs is not consistently present.
gaps.suggestedAction: Write a 200-word fr-fr product-story fragment covering "small-batch production", applying premium-tone.
